scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter scorpio.di run build && pnpm --filter scorpio.ai run build && pnpm --filter sbot.commons run build && pnpm --filter channel.base run build && pnpm --filter channel.lark run build && pnpm --filter channel.slack run build && pnpm --filter channel.wecom run build
scripts.build: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run build && pnpm --filter sbot-cli run build
scripts.prebuild:sbot: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-website run build
scripts.debug:sbot: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run debug
scripts.publish:sbot: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot publish --no-git-checks --access public
scripts.link:sbot: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run build && npm link packages/sbot/dist
scripts.debug:website: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-website run debug
scripts.debug:cli: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-cli run debug
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-cli publish --no-git-checks
